Dog Care Guides

In-depth guides written with veterinary insight — covering puppy care, senior health, nutrition, vaccinations, and everything in between.

General

30 guides

    Complete guide to choosing the right food for large and giant breed dogs, covering nutrition needs, portion sizes, and top recommended brands.

    A comprehensive guide to feeding small and toy breed dogs, including calorie density requirements, kibble size considerations, and our top picks for miniature dogs.

    Everything you need to know about feeding a puppy from weaning through 12 months, including breed-size-specific formulas, feeding schedules, and what to look for on the label.

    Read guide →

  • Best Dog Food for Senior Dogs

    A guide to feeding older dogs aged 7 and above, covering reduced calorie needs, joint-supporting nutrients, digestibility, and the best senior formulas on the market.

    Read guide →

    A detailed month-by-month roadmap covering everything from bringing your puppy home at 8 weeks through their first birthday, including feeding, training, socialization, and vet milestones.

  • Senior Dog Care: A Complete Guide for Dogs 7+

    How to support your ageing dog's health and happiness, covering veterinary check-ups, diet changes, exercise modifications, pain management, and quality of life decisions.

    Read guide →

  • Dog Exercise Guide: How Much Exercise Does Your Dog Need?

    Breed-by-breed and age-by-age breakdown of daily exercise requirements for dogs, including high-energy working breeds, low-energy companion dogs, and everything in between.

    Read guide →

  • Common Dog Health Problems: Symptoms, Causes and Treatment

    An owner's reference guide to the most frequently diagnosed canine health conditions, covering symptoms to watch for, causes, diagnosis, and treatment options.

    Read guide →

  • Dog Grooming Guide: How to Groom Your Dog at Home

    Step-by-step instructions for grooming your dog at home, covering brushing, bathing, nail trimming, ear cleaning, and coat type-specific techniques.

    Read guide →

  • How to Train a Dog: Beginner to Intermediate Guide

    A practical guide to dog training for new and intermediate owners, covering positive reinforcement techniques, essential commands, crate training, recall, and problem behaviours.

    Read guide →

  • How to Choose the Right Dog Breed for Your Lifestyle

    A practical framework for matching a dog breed to your living situation, activity level, family composition, and budget, with breed category breakdowns and a step-by-step decision guide.

    Read guide →

  • Dog Vaccination Schedule: Puppy and Adult Vaccines Explained

    A complete guide to core and non-core dog vaccines, covering what each protects against, when to give them, booster intervals, and what to expect after vaccination.

    Read guide →

  • Dog Dental Care Guide: How to Keep Your Dog's Teeth Healthy

    Everything you need to know about dog dental health, from daily brushing techniques to signs of periodontal disease, dental diets, and professional cleaning under anaesthesia.

    Read guide →

  • Dog Weight Management: How to Help an Overweight Dog Lose Weight

    A vet-aligned guide to identifying obesity in dogs, calculating healthy body condition score, creating a safe calorie deficit, and choosing the best weight management dog food.

    Read guide →

  • Dog Allergies: Symptoms, Causes, and Treatment Options

    A comprehensive guide to canine allergies — environmental, food-based, and contact — covering how to identify triggers, elimination diets, antihistamines, immunotherapy, and management strategies.

    Read guide →

  • Joint Health in Dogs: Preventing and Managing Arthritis

    How to support your dog's joint health from puppyhood through old age, covering breed risk factors, early prevention, supplements, weight management, physiotherapy, and pain relief options.

    Read guide →

  • Dog Anxiety: Causes, Signs, and How to Help

    A practical guide to understanding and managing anxiety in dogs, covering separation anxiety, noise phobia, generalised anxiety, and treatment options from behavioural techniques to medication.

    Read guide →

  • Travelling with Dogs: Car Trips, Holidays, and Flying

    Everything dog owners need to know about travelling safely with their pet, from car safety restraints and motion sickness to pet passports, airline policies, and holiday accommodation.

    Read guide →

  • Puppy Socialisation Guide: How to Raise a Confident Dog

    Why the socialisation window (3-14 weeks) is so critical, what experiences to expose your puppy to, and how to build a confident, well-adjusted adult dog through positive early experiences.

    Read guide →

  • Dog Nutrition Basics: What Should Dogs Actually Eat?

    A science-based introduction to canine nutrition covering macronutrients, micronutrients, AAFCO and FEDIAF standards, raw feeding, grain-free diets, and how to read a dog food label.

    Read guide →

  • Dog Skin and Coat Health: Causes of Dull Coat and Dry Skin

    How to achieve a glossy, healthy coat and address common skin issues in dogs, covering nutrition, omega fatty acids, bathing frequency, parasite control, and underlying health conditions.

    Read guide →

  • Spaying and Neutering Dogs: What Owners Need to Know

    A balanced guide to the benefits and risks of spaying and neutering dogs, covering optimal age by breed size, behavioural effects, health implications, and the recovery process.

    Read guide →

  • Dog Parasite Prevention: Fleas, Ticks, and Worms

    A complete guide to protecting your dog from internal and external parasites, covering the parasite life cycles, how infestations spread, the best preventive products, and treatment protocols.

    Read guide →

  • How to Introduce a New Dog to Your Home and Other Pets

    Step-by-step guidance on bringing a new dog home and introducing them safely to resident dogs, cats, and children, covering the first hours, first week, and ongoing management.

    Read guide →

  • Dog Insurance Guide: How to Choose the Right Policy

    A practical guide to choosing dog insurance in the UK, covering policy types, exclusions, lifetime vs annual cover, breed-specific health conditions, and how to make a claim.

    Read guide →

  • Understanding Dog Body Language and Communication

    A visual and descriptive guide to reading dog body language, covering stress signals, play signals, fear and aggression cues, tail positions, ear positions, and vocalisations.

    Read guide →

  • First Aid for Dogs: What Every Owner Should Know

    Essential first aid knowledge for dog owners, covering how to handle emergencies including cuts and wounds, suspected poisoning, heat stroke, choking, fractures, and CPR.

    Read guide →

  • Feeding Your Dog a Raw Diet: Benefits, Risks, and Getting Started

    A balanced look at raw feeding (BARF) for dogs, including the claimed benefits, food safety risks, how to create a nutritionally complete raw diet, and what the research actually says.

    Read guide →

  • How to Stop a Dog Barking: Causes and Training Solutions

    A practical guide to managing excessive barking in dogs, covering the main causes, proven training techniques, management strategies, and when to involve a professional behaviourist.

    Read guide →

  • Hip Dysplasia in Dogs: Symptoms, Treatment, and Prevention

    A thorough owner's guide to canine hip dysplasia, covering which breeds are most at risk, how the condition develops, diagnosis through PennHIP and BVA scoring, and all treatment options.
